text:
3 things running this account taught me about automated growth:

1. The official Meta API lets you automate without fear — no browser hacks, no ban risk.
2. Free tools (GitHub Actions + free AI) run the whole loop: post, analyze, write better. $0/month.
3. The real unlock? A one-time 2-hour setup. Tokens auto-refresh. You never touch it again.

Your job becomes watching the compound. Not grinding the daily post.
